images.title: Planolinoides borealis (Gyllenhal, 1827) Syn.- Aphodius (Planolinus) borealis (Gyllenhal, 1827) (32806212833).png
images.description:
Family: Scarabaeidae Size: 4.4 mm (4.0 to 5.0 mm) Distribution: Europe Ecology: In droppings of wild animals in the mountains, on the coasts in sheep's dung Location: France, Corsica, Asco, Asco valley leg.det. U.Schmidt, 2.VI.1973

Photo: U.Schmidt, 2017

images.title: Tilloidea transversalis (Charpentier, 1825) (15985529998).png
images.description:
Family: Cleridae Size: 11,7 mm ( 9,0 to 12 mm) Distribution: South Europe, North Africa Ecology: the species is predacious Location: Corsica, Asco, 1500 m leg. U.Eitschberger, 9.VII.1987; det. U.Schmidt, 1987

Photo: U.Schmidt, 2014
